Yanmar ·Engine

Yanmar 6N330 / 8N330

Spare parts for the Yanmar 6N330 / 8N330 marine diesel (330×440 mm bore × stroke, 2,207–4,410 kW @ 620 rpm). Includes both Japan (732659-) and China-licensed (132654-) variants where available.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
CYLINDER HEAD 4
Part NumberDescription
732659-11701-CCylinder Head Assembly – Japan OEM (alt: 732658-11104)
132654-01320Cylinder Head Gasket / Packing T=1.0
132654-01321Cylinder Head Gasket (alt.)
746673-15104Indicator Cock Assembly
CYLINDER LINER 2
Part NumberDescription
132654-01141-CCylinder Liner Assembly HFO – Japan OEM
132654-01172Cylinder Liner Assembly HFO – China licensed (alt: 132664-01172)
PISTON & RINGS 6
Part NumberDescription
732659-22030Piston Assembly HFO – Japan OEM
132654-22021Piston Assembly HFO – China licensed
132654-22180Piston Ring 1st Compression
132654-22150Piston Ring 2nd Compression
132654-22160Piston Ring 3rd Compression
132654-22230Oil Control Ring
CONNECTING ROD 2
Part NumberDescription
732659-23011-CConnecting Rod Assembly – Japan OEM
132653-23072Connecting Rod Assembly – China licensed

ASIL TRADING

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
